positive.prompt: Create an ASP.NET Core Minimal API endpoint for fetching users
Add OpenAPI annotations and swagger metadata to this controller endpoint
Set up global error handling middleware in Program.cs

negative.prompt: Implement a file upload endpoint in C# minimal API
Write a SQL query for EF Core optimization

evals.prompt: Create a Minimal API endpoint for POST /api/items with request validation and OpenAPI metadata.
evals.expected_output: Endpoint is defined using MapPost() in Program.cs with correct return values.
expectations: Endpoint is defined using MapPost() in Program.cs
Produces/ProducesProblem metadata is added for OpenAPI documentation
Returns correct HTTP status codes (201 Created, 400 Bad Request)
